extraction.one_line_summary: CAVAGNA Alex attacked from 7-rider break in final 3km but was caught and outsprint by stage winner at Lago Laceno finish, while LEKNESSUND Andreas took pink by gaining 2:00+ on peloton.
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates caught napping with leader MAIOLA dropped early at 95km+ into stage, required tow back to bunch.
LEKNESSUND collected 3 bonus seconds at final intermediate sprint despite being in break, tactical awareness for GC calculation.
VAN WILDER Ilan last DSM domestique dropped inside 3km, suggesting team rode front of GC group longer than competitors.

rider_signals.LEKNESSUND Andreas: positive: youngest breakaway rider at 23 took pink jersey by 28 seconds, showing maturity to manage 80km break formation
rider_signals.MAIOLA Davide: negative: UAE leader caught out in early split requiring teammate assistance, vulnerability on difficult parcours
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: willingly relinquished pink jersey control to DSM, conserving resources after three days defending
